name: Chili Krieghauser
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef for 20 minutes or until dark and crumbly. Pour off excess fat.
2. Add salt, onion soup, chili powder, cumin, pepper, and tomato sauce to the pot. Stir well.
3. Allow the mixture to simmer for a while.
4. Add undrained kidney beans, cocoa, and Coca-Cola.
5. Continue simmering until the dish is ready.
